Risk and Capital Checklist

[ ] Max acceptable drawdown is defined
[ ] Max risk per trade is defined
[ ] Max daily loss stop is defined
[ ] Position size min/max is defined
[ ] Concurrent positions cap is defined
[ ] Leverage policy is defined
[ ] Expected transaction cost is modeled
[ ] Slippage assumption is modeled
[ ] Liquidity constraints are considered
[ ] Strategy capacity assumption is documented
[ ] Kill-switch conditions are documented
[ ] Failure mode and fallback action are documented
